title: (同人誌) [紫信号] アロナちゃんNTR3ページカラー版 (ブルーアーカイブ)
(成年コミック) [雑誌] 異世快楽天 Vol.31
(成年コミック) [阿賀まりの] ギャルだくみ～家出処女とのハメまくり同棲セックス～【18禁】 9
[TVC] [Lilith Soft] Taimanin Asagi 3 / 対魔忍アサギ 3 [English + Ejaculation Counter]
description:
**The information is the same as with another torrent of mine (https://sukebei.nyaa.si/view/4070632), so feel free to skip this entire explanation since it is a 1:1 copy of the previous upload**

Before anyone rushes towards the comments section asking why I am making a reupload for this game (well the game is not included in the torrent, so technically that's not even true), hear me out.

Considering how old some VNs are and how still Lilith is behind the current times in terms of QoL changes most VNs have received over the last 2 decades, it's safe to say that expecting them to actually put in some effort into them (let alone releasing more of 'em to begin with) is just daydreaming.

So, considering the fact that the KiriKiri engine doesn't obfuscate the game code by design, **I have decided to mod the game in order to add a ejaculation counter**. For those who don't know, it's simply a feature that lets you know when the male character (or female) is about to ejaculate in that particular scene. Like I said before, most VNs do already include this feature, so look into them if you need some visual clarification on how it goes.

Still, I have decided to include a comparison between an unmodified (but with the english translation applied on) copy of the game and the modified one from me:

![ImageComparison](https://i.ibb.co/FmPG1LR/demo.jpg)

(If you want to see the mod in action in video format, here it is: https://pixeldrain.com/u/zrZ1Jghk)

This torrent __only__ includes the patch.xp3 file for the mod, in case that you still need the game, go for any other torrent that has it, and after that make sure to **READ the READme file**.

Before ending this, I want to say **HUGE thanks** to *Rattan Man* for making the english patch for this game, and for letting me know the translation for something he ommited for his 1.0 translation of the game (if he ever releases the 2.0 retranslation of the game).

Contact me: https://discord.gg/fjZKJJUWw4
